title: Vivarium Population Spenser: Emigration protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2b9s3","text":"Description of the steps followed by Vivarium Population Spenser library when running the Emigration module. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1f5ap","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9pg0e","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"95qmr","text":"The rates used in the Emigration component are found here:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dg6oa","text":"https://github.com/alan-turing-institute/daedalus/blob/develop/persistent_data/Emig_2011_2012_LEEDS2.csvv","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":104}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"2887B26719F011EBB41B0A58A9FEAC2A","url":"https://github.com/alan-turing-institute/daedalus/blob/develop/persistent_data/Emig_2011_2012_LEEDS2.csv"}}}}
steps: Divide the annual international emigration rates for that local authority by the number of time steps existing in a year.
Select all individuals in the sample that appear as "alive" and have an associated gender.
For these individuals, get the emigration rate given their age, gender, ethnicity and location and turn it into a probability.
Using random sampling and the emigration probability of the individuals, choose which individuals emigrate in that time step.
Change the status of these individuals from "alive" to "emigrated". Record the time when they emigrated.
creator: Camila Rangel Smith
